payload.input_str: {'sql': "SELECT cars_data.Accelerate FROM cars_data JOIN car_names ON cars_data.Id = car_names.MakeId JOIN car_makers ON car_names.Make = car_makers.Id WHERE LOWER(car_names.Model) = LOWER('hornet sportabout (sw)') AND LOWER(car_makers.Maker) = LOWER('amc');"}
